description_long: This is a modern, medium-sized sofa with a geometric-patterned brown upholstery. The sofa features a single, continuous seat and backrest, both of which are attached and have a uniform thickness. The armrests are straight, boxy, and extend from the seat to the same height as the backrest, creating a clean, angular silhouette. The legs are short, angled outward, and made of wood, providing a sturdy base and a slight elevation from the ground. The upholstery has a subtle, diagonal checkered pattern that adds visual interest without being overly bold. Overall, the sofa exudes a contemporary, minimalist aesthetic suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern brown sofa with geometric-patterned upholstery, straight armrests, and wooden angled legs. It has a clean, boxy silhouette and a continuous seat and backrest.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, straight armrests, and the continuous seat and backrest with the geometric pattern clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the sofa's depth, the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the angled wooden leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backrest's full width and the continuation of the geometric upholstery pattern, with both rear legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the sofa's depth, armrest profile, and angled wooden leg.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat and backrest cushions, both attached and uniform in size, with no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at seat height, matching the backrest height, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, outward-angled wooden legs positioned at the corners, exposed and rectangular in profile.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with no segmentation or tufting, matching the width of the seat.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Geometric, diagonal checkered pattern in shades of brown, with a matte, slightly textured fabric finish.
